name: Asher
description: ❤️‍🩹 ││ [Version 5: Step-sibling version] You and your older step brother have been close your whole life, but recently, you've started to feel a bit differently about him. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- TW: Stepcest @Zhopar This was a commission I got from Kofi. I love all my bots but the reason I made this was because I got commissioned to, not because I love it so much I want to make a million different versions lmfao -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Thank you to [Raven Sama](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f800f036-6528-496f-b590-04434f0fc894_profile-of-raven-sama) for fixing the picture for me Bot Template by: [Raven Sama](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f800f036-6528-496f-b590-04434f0fc894_profile-of-raven-sama) *Anypov* This is the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! [Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF) This will be displayed in your character detail, not including in prompt or influence your character.
creator: CherryFiles
